ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the neighborhood is located in */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "average_house_value" REAL /* Average value of housing units in the neighborhood */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the neighborhood's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the city */,
  "average_house_value" REAL /* Average value of housing units in the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the city's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males in the neighborhood */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females in the neighborhood */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate from the previous year */,
  "age_median" REAL /* Median age of the population in the neighborhood for the given year */,
  "income_median" REAL /* Median income of the population in the neighborhood for the given year */,
  "housing_value_median" REAL /* Median value of housing units in the neighborhood for the given year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_distributions" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age distribution record */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population record */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-14, 15-64, 65+) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of people in the age group */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the age group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the age distribution data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_distributions_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population record */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket (e.g., <$25k, $25k-$50k, $50k+$) */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the bracket */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income in the bracket */,
  "income_count" INTEGER /* Number of households in the bracket */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of households in the income bracket */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the income data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing record */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population record */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., single-family, apartment, condominium) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of housing units of the type */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value of the housing units */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of housing units of the type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the housing data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population record */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, not in labor force) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of people in the employment status */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the employment status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the employment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population record */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., high school, bachelor's, master's, doctoral) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of people with the education level */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population with the education level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the education data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population record */,
  "health_indicator" TEXT /* Health indicator (e.g., life expectancy, smoking rate, obesity rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the health data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, researcher, community leader) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "geospatial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the neighborhood center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the neighborhood center */,
  "boundary_polygon" TEXT /* Boundary polygon of the neighborhood in WKT format */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date for the geospatial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geospatial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset (e.g., population, age distribution, income) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES population_data ("population_id")
)
